subcodes.first_line: O descendant of that manifest Light! Praise be unto God that through physical lineage thou art born of the very essence and spirit of that glorious personage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حفید آن نور مبین الحمد لله با نسبت جسمانی زاده عنصر جان و دل آنشخص جلیل
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
